en_title: 'A Triumph of Corporate Convenience Over Consumer Choice' — Backlash to PlayStation Killing Discs Intensifies as Retailer Association Slams Sony
cn_title: 索尼取消PlayStation游戏光盘遭零售商协会强烈反对，30万玩家请愿维权
subtitle: 实体光盘的存亡
opus_summary: 英国零售商协会批评索尼计划从2028年起停止发行PS5实体光盘，称此举剥夺消费者选择。分析师认为数字版利润更高，索尼不会改变决定；欧盟也表示无力阻止这一趋势。

paragraphs.en: A retailer association has heavily criticized Sony’s decision to kill discs on PlayStation, saying it takes away consumer choice from gamers.
paragraphs.cn: 一家零售商协会强烈批评索尼取消PlayStation游戏光盘的决定，称此举剥夺了玩家的消费选择。

paragraphs.en: Sony's controversial decision to stop releasing PlayStation games on physical discs means all new PS5 games launched from January 2028 onwards will be digital only — something that's almost certain to continue on PS6 . The online backlash has been loud and clear. A high-profile petition calling on Sony to reconsider its decision has just passed the 300,000 signatures milestone, and in the past few days PS5 users have taken to social media to share screenshots of cancelled PS Plus subscriptions.
paragraphs.cn: 索尼停止以实体光盘发行PlayStation游戏的争议决定，意味着从2028年1月起推出的所有新PS5游戏都将仅提供数字版——这一政策几乎肯定会延续到PS6。网上的反弹声势浩大且态度明确。一份呼吁索尼重新考虑决定的知名请愿刚刚突破30万签名；过去几天，PS5用户还在社交媒体上分享取消PS Plus订阅的截图。

paragraphs.en: The Game Business has now reported on comments from the UK’s Digital Entertainment and Retail Association (ERA), which called Sony’s decision “a triumph of corporate convenience over consumer choice.”
paragraphs.cn: The Game Business报道了英国数字娱乐与零售协会（ERA）的评论，该协会称索尼的决定是「企业便利战胜消费者选择」。

paragraphs.en: In a statement published online , Kim Bayley, CEO of ERA, said its data shows that 25% of under 25s use discs for gaming, and that discs should remain as a choice on top of digital.
paragraphs.cn: ERA首席执行官Kim Bayley在网上发表声明称，该协会数据显示，25岁以下人群中有25%使用光盘玩游戏；除数字版外，光盘也应继续作为一种选择。

paragraphs.en: "Playstation’s announcement that major games will no longer be available on disc is a triumph of corporate convenience over consumer choice,” Bayley said.
paragraphs.cn: Bayley说：「PlayStation宣布大型游戏将不再提供光盘版，这是企业便利战胜消费者选择。」

paragraphs.en: “Every year, millions of gamers still choose to buy physical copies because they value true ownership. A disc can be shared with family, traded in, collected, preserved and, crucially, still played years from now. A download licence often offers none of those freedoms.
paragraphs.cn: 「每年仍有数百万玩家选择购买实体版，因为他们看重真正的所有权。光盘可以与家人分享、拿去置换、收藏、保存，关键是多年后依然能够游玩。下载许可通常不提供这些自由。」

paragraphs.en: “ERA consumer data shows that 25% of under 25's use discs for gaming and the total disc based games market was valued at over £300million in 2025, demonstrating that there remains a substantial and committed audience for boxed games.
paragraphs.cn: 「ERA消费者数据显示，25岁以下人群中有25%使用光盘玩游戏；2025年实体光盘游戏市场总价值超过3亿英镑(约合人民币27亿元)，这证明盒装游戏仍拥有规模可观且坚定的受众。」

paragraphs.en: “Retailers see this demand every day. Physical games continue to bring people into shops and give consumers real value through gifting, collecting and resale.
paragraphs.cn: 「零售商每天都能看到这种需求。实体游戏持续把顾客吸引进店，并通过赠送、收藏和转售为消费者带来实际价值。」

paragraphs.en: “The industry should be embracing every legitimate way consumers want to buy games, not narrowing their choices. Digital distribution has transformed gaming and is hugely popular, but it should complement physical formats, not replace them.
paragraphs.cn: 「行业应该拥抱消费者购买游戏的每一种正当方式，而不是缩小他们的选择。数字发行改变了游戏行业，也极受欢迎，但它应该补充实体形式，而不是取代实体形式。」

paragraphs.en: “Consumers deserve the freedom to choose how they buy their entertainment. Removing discs doesn't represent progress – it simply removes choice. That's bad for gamers, bad for retailers and ultimately bad for the long-term health and preservation of our games industry."
paragraphs.cn: 「消费者应当拥有选择如何购买娱乐内容的自由。取消光盘并不代表进步，只是单纯剥夺选择。这对玩家、零售商都不利，最终也会损害游戏行业的长期健康与保存。」

paragraphs.en: ERA’s board members include representatives of the likes of Amazon, what’s left of UK video game retailer GAME, HMV, and more bricks and mortar and online shops. The comments of its CEO join a growing call for Sony to reverse its decision, which has dominated discussion around PlayStation and its announcement ever since it was made last week.
paragraphs.cn: ERA董事会成员包括亚马逊、英国游戏零售商GAME残存的业务、HMV，以及更多实体店和网店的代表。该协会首席执行官的评论加入了要求索尼撤回决定的声浪；自上周公布决定以来，这一话题一直主导着围绕PlayStation及其公告的讨论。

paragraphs.en: However, it remains unlikely that Sony will U-turn on this, analysts have told IGN . Dr. Serkan Toto, CEO of Japanese game industry consultancy firm Kantan Games, suggested that even if half a million people cancelled their PlayStation Plus subscription in protest, it would be just a drop in the ocean for Sony — which is not going to change its mind.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，分析师告诉IGN，索尼不太可能在此事上改变方向。日本游戏行业咨询公司Kantan Games首席执行官Serkan Toto博士表示，即使有50万人通过取消PlayStation Plus订阅来抗议，对索尼来说也只是沧海一粟，不会促使它改变主意。

paragraphs.en: "I sympathize with physical media fans, but Sony will not reverse this decision," Toto told IGN. "They of course knew what the online reaction would look like, and they now wait for this storm to pass.
paragraphs.cn: Toto告诉IGN：「我同情实体媒体粉丝，但索尼不会撤回这一决定。他们当然知道网上会出现怎样的反应，现在只是在等待风暴过去。」

paragraphs.en: "Sony has over 120 million active PlayStation users," he continued. "Around 50 million people subscribe to PlayStation Plus. As a thought experiment, let's say 500,000 cancel in protest, that would be just 1% of that business gone — of course not enough for Sony to start rethinking. Digital is just too lucrative."
paragraphs.cn: 他继续说道：「索尼拥有超过1.2亿活跃PlayStation用户，约有5000万人订阅PlayStation Plus。我们做个思想实验：假设50万人取消订阅抗议，也只相当于这项业务损失1%，当然不足以让索尼重新思考。数字版实在太赚钱了。」

paragraphs.en: For Sony, going all-digital for new game releases will earn it more money from every sale at a time when console sales are expected to plummet due to their rising cost. For a first-party PlayStation game such as The Last of Us, Sony will only keep around 65% of the money from a physical copy, with around 30% going to the retailer and roughly another 5% on manufacturing costs. Meanwhile, for a physical copy of a third-party game such as the Activision-published Call of Duty, Sony will get a licensing fee, likely around 15%.
paragraphs.cn: 对索尼而言，在预计主机价格上涨将导致销量暴跌之际，新游戏全数字发行能让它从每笔销售中赚取更多。以第一方PlayStation游戏《最后生还者》为例，实体版收入中索尼只能保留约65%，约30%给零售商，另有约5%用于制造成本。至于动视发行的《使命召唤》这类第三方游戏实体版，索尼获得的可能是约15%的授权费。

paragraphs.en: For downloads, however, the margins are much higher. For a first-party game sold via Sony's own PlayStation Store, the company obviously keeps 100% of the revenue. For third-party games such as Call of Duty, meanwhile, Sony keeps a 30% cut (so, roughly $21 for a $70 game).
paragraphs.cn: 然而，数字下载的利润率高得多。第一方游戏通过索尼自家的PlayStation Store销售时，公司显然能保留100%的收入。至于《使命召唤》等第三方游戏，索尼可抽成30%（也就是一款70美元(约合人民币475元)的游戏，索尼抽成约21美元(约合人民币142元)）。

paragraphs.en: Sid Shuman, Senior Director, Sony Interactive Entertainment Content Communications, said in a post on PlayStation Blog that the decision was “in response to shifting trends in consumer preference.”
paragraphs.cn: 索尼互动娱乐内容传播高级总监Sid Shuman在PlayStation博客发文称，这一决定是「为了回应消费者偏好不断变化的趋势」。

paragraphs.en: “This is a natural direction for Sony Interactive Entertainment to adapt to consumer trends as the general preference for digital media significantly outpaces physical discs,” Shuman continued. “This transition will enable us to align more closely with how most of our community prefers to access and play games today.”
paragraphs.cn: Shuman继续说道：「随着消费者对数字媒体的普遍偏好显著超过实体光盘，这是索尼互动娱乐适应消费者趋势的自然方向。这一转变将让我们更贴近社群大多数成员如今获取和游玩游戏的方式。」

paragraphs.en: Piers Harding-Rolls, games industry analyst at Ampere, has said the data backs this up, and that a lot has changed over the course of the last two generations. "Console gaming is the last hold-out for physical media in the gaming sector, but physical product has been declining in importance," he said in a post on the Ampere website . "Back in 2013 when the PS4 launched, Ampere data shows that only 13% of total full games unit sales for Sony consoles were digital (including digital-only games). Fast forward to 2025, and this digital share of full game purchases stood at almost 80% of the total.
paragraphs.cn: Ampere游戏行业分析师Piers Harding-Rolls表示，数据支持这一说法，过去两代主机期间已经发生了巨大变化。他在Ampere网站发文称：「主机游戏是游戏领域实体媒体最后的堡垒，但实体产品的重要性一直在下降。2013年PS4发售时，Ampere数据显示，索尼主机完整游戏销量中只有13%是数字版（包括仅提供数字版的游戏）。快进到2025年，完整游戏购买中数字版占比已接近总量的80%。

paragraphs.en: "Inevitably there will be concerns from PlayStation gamers around various aspects of this announcement including choice, accessing older physical games on new consoles, the ability to collect physical games, and game preservation, however the purchasing trends of gamers are clear."
paragraphs.cn: 「PlayStation玩家必然会对这项公告的各个方面感到担忧，包括选择权、在新主机上运行旧实体游戏、收藏实体游戏的能力，以及游戏保存问题；然而，玩家的购买趋势已经很明确。」

paragraphs.en: One analyst said fans of physical media had their chance and blew it, so there’s no going back. “If gamers and preservationists had bought more physical games, Sony wouldn’t have seen the digital sales ratios that justify this decision,” Robin Zhu, a games analyst at Bernstein, told the Financial Times .
paragraphs.cn: 一名分析师表示，实体媒体粉丝曾经有机会却错过了，因此已经没有回头路。Bernstein游戏分析师Robin Zhu告诉《金融时报》：「如果玩家和保存主义者当初购买更多实体游戏，索尼就不会看到足以证明这一决定合理的数字销售比例。」

paragraphs.en: “Digital game sales carry essentially 100% incremental margin... the cost of the physical package, shipping and retailer margins can be more than 20% per cent of sticker price.”
paragraphs.cn: 「数字游戏销售基本拥有100%的增量利润……实体包装、运输和零售商利润的成本，可能超过标价的20%。」

paragraphs.en: Meanwhile, government authorities seem unlikely to be able to do much to prevent Sony going through with its decision. Over the weekend the EU said it was powerless to stop Sony — and indeed any company — from killing discs.
paragraphs.cn: 与此同时，政府机构似乎也不太可能采取有效措施阻止索尼执行这一决定。上周末，欧盟表示无力阻止索尼——事实上也无力阻止任何公司——取消光盘。
